class.name: ResonanceBakeConfig
class.brief_description: Per-volume bake configuration for Steam Audio probes.
class.description: Per-volume bake configuration. Assign from ResonanceProbeVolume as bake_config for reusable presets. Save as .tres for sharing across scenes. Falls back to create_default() when null. Controls reflection type, pathing, static source/listener, and quality (rays, bounces, threads). Pathing visibility params (bake_pathing_vis_range, bake_pathing_radius, bake_pathing_threshold) are used both when baking and at runtime for pathing simulation.

method.name: get_bake_params
method.description: Returns bake params dictionary for C++ set_bake_params.

method.name: create_default
method.description: Creates default bake config for volumes without one assigned.

members.member: Pathing visibility range in meters (10–2000). Used at bake and runtime.
Pathing probe radius (0.1–2.0). Used at bake and runtime.
Pathing propagation threshold (0.01–1.0). Used at bake and runtime.
Bake static source from bake_sources node.
Bake static listener from bake_listeners node.
